name: Brighton Bank
description_short: FDIC-insured community bank serving Utah with 46+ years of experience, offering checking, savings, business banking, and digital financial tools for individuals and small businesses.
description_long:
Brighton Bank is a locally-owned community bank based in Salt Lake City, Utah, with over 46 years of history serving small businesses, families, and individuals. The bank positions itself as a relationship-focused institution with personal attention from branch leadership, as evidenced by their customer testimonials highlighting Vice Presidents' involvement in business accounts. The bank operates multiple branch locations in the Salt Lake City area and maintains FDIC insurance protection for deposits.

The bank offers a comprehensive suite of banking services including online checking and savings accounts, remote deposit capture, bill pay, and business banking solutions. They provide digital invoicing and payment acceptance through their Online Business Banking platform, debit card management via mobile app with real-time controls and alerts, and access to the STAR ATM network. Brighton Bank also offers a free 12-month trial of OnAlert, a credit monitoring and identity protection service that includes credit tracking, fraud alerts, and ChexSystems insights.

Brighton Bank distinguishes itself through its community bank model with local decision-making, personalized business relationships, and emphasis on understanding customer financial goals. The integration of modern digital banking features—including remote deposit, bankcard controls, and invoicing—within a traditional community bank structure appeals to customers who value both personal service and technological convenience. Their OnAlert identity protection offering provides added value beyond standard banking services.

As a regional bank with limited branch presence (3 documented locations in Salt Lake City area), Brighton Bank is best suited for Utah-based customers prioritizing local banking relationships. The bank's strengths lie in small business and personalized service rather than competitive product pricing or nationwide accessibility. Customers outside the Salt Lake City region would have limited access to physical locations, making this primarily a regional banking option. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Remote deposit capture (24/7 with same-day credit option)
Debit card management with real-time controls and alerts
OnAlert credit monitoring and identity protection (12-month free trial)
Fraud alerts and real-time credit tracking
pros: FDIC-insured deposits with full faith and credit of the U.S. Government backing
Over 46 years of established history and community banking experience
Free 12-month trial of OnAlert identity protection and credit monitoring service
Remote deposit capture available 24/7 with same-day credit by 2:00 p.m. MT
Digital invoicing and payment acceptance integrated into Online Business Banking platform
Real-time debit card controls and fraud alerts through mobile app
Personal relationship model with branch Vice Presidents for business accounts
Extended drive-up hours (8:30 a.m. - 5:00 p.m. weekdays) for convenience
cons: Limited geographic footprint with only 3 documented branch locations, all in Salt Lake City area
No mention of competitive interest rates, APYs, or fee structures on website
OnAlert free trial converts to paid subscription ($5.99-$9.99/month) automatically if not cancelled
Regional bank with limited accessibility for non-Utah customers seeking full-service banking
Website lacks detailed information about account types, minimum balances, or product specifics

contact.address: 7101 S Highland Dr, Salt Lake City, UT 84121

best_for: Small business owners in the Salt Lake City area seeking personalized banking relationships
Utah-based individuals and families prioritizing local community bank values
Customers who value identity protection and want integrated credit monitoring with banking
Businesses needing digital invoicing and payment acceptance through online banking
diagnosis: Brighton Bank is best for small business owners and individuals in the Salt Lake City area who value personalized community banking relationships and want integrated digital banking with identity protection services. The main caveat is geographic limitation—this is a regional Utah bank with no accessibility for customers outside the Salt Lake City area and limited branch presence even within its market.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 7101 S Highland Dr, Salt Lake City, UT 84121
